SEARCH
Module ProjetGenieLogicel3
Package controller

Class GraphController

java.lang.Object
controller.GraphController
public class GraphController extends Object
Controller responsible for building and configuring the graph. Separates graph construction logic from the UI layer.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    Indicates whether the controller is waiting for a deletion click

    Indicates whether the controller is waiting for two nodes to create an edge

  • Field Details

    • graph

      private final Graph graph
      Graph currently managed by the controller

    • view

      private GraphView view
      View used to refresh the selection and the graph display

    • selectedNode

      private Node selectedNode
      Currently selected node, used to create an edge with a second click

    • nodeCreationMode

      private boolean nodeCreationMode
      Indicates whether the controller is waiting for a click to create a node

    • edgeCreationMode

      private boolean edgeCreationMode
      Indicates whether the controller is waiting for two nodes to create an edge

    • deleteMode

      private boolean deleteMode
      Indicates whether the controller is waiting for a deletion click

      private SimulationEngine engine

    • selectedEdge

      private Edge selectedEdge

      private Agent selectedAgent

  • Constructor Details

    • GraphController

      public GraphController(Graph graph)
      Creates a controller bound to a graph instance.
      Parameters:
      graph - graph managed by this controller

  • Method Details

    • setEngine

      public void setEngine(SimulationEngine engine)
      Parameters:
      engine -

    • getSelectedEdge

      public Edge getSelectedEdge()
      Returns:

    • getSelectedAgent

      public Agent getSelectedAgent()
      Returns:

    • getSelectedNode

      public Node getSelectedNode()
      Returns:

    • buildGraph

      public static Graph buildGraph()
      Builds and returns a configured graph with nodes and edges. The graph contains 4 nodes (1 to 4) connected by weighted edges.
      Returns:
      a fully configured Graph instance

    • addRandomNodes

      public void addRandomNodes(SimulationEngine engine)
      Parameters:
      engine -

    • addRandomAgents

      public void addRandomAgents(SimulationEngine engine)
      Parameters:
      engine -

    • handleNodeClicked

      public void handleNodeClicked(Node clickedNode)
      Handles a node click. The first click selects a node, the second click on another node creates an edge. Clicking the same node twice cancels the selection.
      Parameters:
      clickedNode - node clicked by the user

    • handleEdgeClicked

      public void handleEdgeClicked(Edge clickedEdge)
      Handles a click on an edge and removes it when deletion mode is active.
      Parameters:
      clickedEdge - edge clicked by the user

    • handleAgentClicked

      public void handleAgentClicked(Agent agent)
      Handles a click on an agent in the graph view. Selects the agent and updates the stats panel accordingly. If the same agent is clicked again, deselects it.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent that was clicked

    • generateNodeId

      private int generateNodeId()
      Generates a new node identifier not already used in the graph.
      Returns:
      next available node id

    • handleBackgroundClick

      public void handleBackgroundClick(javafx.geometry.Point2D point)
      Handles a click on the empty drawing area and creates a new node.
      Parameters:
      point - the coordinates of the click on the canvas

    • attachView

      public void attachView(GraphView view)
      Attaches the view to the controller. The controller also listens to background clicks to create new nodes.
      Parameters:
      view - graph view instance

    • createAgentAtSelectedNode

      public void createAgentAtSelectedNode(SimulationEngine engine)
      Creates an agent on the currently selected node and assigns a destination, speed and pathfinding algorithm.
      Parameters:
      engine - simulation engine used to store the new agent

    • disableAllModes

      public void disableAllModes()

    • enableNodeCreationMode

      public void enableNodeCreationMode()
      Enables node creation mode. The next click on the graph background will create a new node.

    • disableNodeCreationMode

      public void disableNodeCreationMode()
      Disables node creation mode and restores the normal cursor.

    • enableEdgeCreationMode

      public void enableEdgeCreationMode()
      Enables edge creation mode. The next two node clicks will be used to create an edge.

    • disableEdgeCreationMode

      public void disableEdgeCreationMode()
      Disables edge creation mode and restores the normal cursor.

    • enableDeleteMode

      public void enableDeleteMode()
      Enables deletion mode. The next click on a node or an edge will remove it.

    • disableDeleteMode

      public void disableDeleteMode()
      Disables deletion mode and restores the normal cursor.

    • deleteSelected

      public void deleteSelected()

    • editSelected

      public void editSelected()

    • clearGraph

      public void clearGraph()
      Clears the graph completely so the user can start a new simulation.
